build.buildCommand: curl -fsSL https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.0-stable.tar.xz -o /tmp/flutter.tar.xz && tar xf /tmp/flutter.tar.xz -C /opt && ln -sf /opt/flutter/bin/flutter /usr/local/bin && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release
build.installCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y xz-utils curl git
